query:
INSERT INTO overlay_nodes (path, kind, backing, mode, size, mtime_ns, source_oid)
         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
         ON CONFLICT(path) DO UPDATE SET
           kind = excluded.kind,
           backing = excluded.backing,
           mode = excluded.mode,
           size = excluded.size,
           mtime_ns = excluded.mtime_ns,
           source_oid = excluded.source_oid
